name: file-uploads
title: File Uploads
description: Manages uploaded files in a r2 bucket.
author: nocdn

commands.name: files
commands.title: List Files
commands.subtitle: List and manage files in the bucket
commands.description: List files in a Cloudflare R2 bucket

commands.name: upload-file
commands.title: Upload File
commands.subtitle: Upload the selected file in Finder
commands.description: Upload the selected Finder file to a Cloudflare R2 bucket

preferences.name: endpoint
preferences.title: R2 S3 API Endpoint
preferences.description: Your R2 S3 API endpoint without the bucket path, for example https://<ACCOUNT_ID>.r2.cloudflarestorage.com

preferences.name: accessKeyId
preferences.title: Access Key ID
preferences.description: The Access Key ID generated from Cloudflare R2 API tokens

preferences.name: secretAccessKey
preferences.title: Secret Access Key
preferences.description: The Secret Access Key generated from Cloudflare R2 API tokens

preferences.name: bucket
preferences.title: Bucket
preferences.description: The R2 bucket name to list

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
